Winning teams advance to Play-ins</p><p>5. Following that the winning team will advance to</p><p>6. playoffs, semifinals and finals respectively.</p><p>7. (Rule Modifications: The rules and schedules are subject to change at the discretion of the organizing committee.)</p><p><strong>Map Selection:</strong></p><p>Both team's Leaders will participate in a coin toss. The winning Leader must then choose one of the following</p><p><strong>options:</strong></p><p>Final Map Ban: The toss winner can decide which map to ban last from the remaining pool, </p><p>OR</p><p>Side Selection: The toss winner can choose the starting side for the match (either defenders or attackers). </p><p>This decision is final. Any disputes will be resolved by the tournament officials.</p><p><strong>Code Of Conduct:</strong></p><ul><li>Any form of harassment or discrimination based on race, gender, sexuality, politics, or any other characteristic will result in immediate disqualification.</li><li>Players must compete fairly without using cheat hacks, software, or hardware modifications that provide an unfair advantage.</li><li>Each team can take participates from other colleges and participate (graduated participants are not allowed. Physical Identification cards will be verified for expiry date </li><li>Multiple teams from the same college are allowed. Players are requested to strictly follow all events rules and regulations provided by the organizer.</li></ul><p><strong>Rules and regulations for Tote Bag Painting </strong></p><p><strong>Rules And Regulations:-</strong></p><p> 1. Team Composition: Participants can enter individually or in a team of maximum 2 people.</p><p> 2. Registration: Limited to the first 25 teams on a first-come, first-served basis. Registration fee is 150/- per team. ( the tote bag will be provided by the organizers</p><p> 3. Duration: The competition will last exactly 2 hours.</p><p> 4. Canvas: One standard plain cotton tote bag will be provided to each team by the organizers.</p><p> 5. BYOS (Bring Your Own Supplies): Participants must bring all their own painting materials. This includes:</p><p>   * Fabric paints, acrylics, or textile markers.</p><p>   * Brushes of various sizes.</p><p>   * Palettes, water containers, and rags/paper towels for cleaning.</p><p>   * Pencils and erasers for sketching.</p><p> * Prohibited Items: Spray paints, glitter glue that takes 24+ hours to dry, and pre-made stencils or stamps are not allowed. All work must be freehand.</p><p><strong>Rules of Play</strong></p><p>1.Originality: The design must be original. Reference images on phones are allowed, but direct tracing or copying of existing copyrighted artworks is discouraged.</p><p>2. On-the-Spot Creation: No pre-sketching or priming on the bag is allowed before the timer starts.</p><p>3. Decorum: Artwork must be appropriate for a college environment. Any entries containing offensive, vulgar, or sensitive imagery will be disqualified immediately.</p><p>NOTE:- there will be three prizes for 1st, 2nd and 3rd place.Participants get to take their tote bag home</p>
